MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion To Transfer Venue Under Ccp 397 Or/Motion To Dismiss And Transfer Under Ccp 418.10
Off Calendar Sep-17-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID P. DIBBLE OF THE ZWEERDLING DIBBLE, LLP, TEL. NO. (707) 445-9628 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. BENJAMIN IKUTA OF THE LOW MCKINLEY BALERIA & SALENKO, LLP, TEL. NO. (916) 231-2400 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING- A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS JERROLD NADLER, MD AND CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST DBA MARK TWAIN ST. JOSEPH HOSPITAL'S Motion To Transfer Venue Under CCP 397 Or Motion To Dismiss And Transfer Under CCP 418.10 is granted.
The convenience of witnesses and the interests of justice are best served by transferring this case to Calaveras County where the acts occured and where virtually all non-party as well as party precipient witnesses are located, especially given that the facts of the case have no connection to San Francisco, that no witnesses are located here and that requiring the medical witnesses to come to San Francisco would likely have a negative impact on healthcare in Calaveras County during trial. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 = (301/PJB)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2010 Set For Trial On Oct-25-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-08-10 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 604
